title: gnome-control-center bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[47.7-1]
- Update to 47.7

[47.6-3]
- Add 'Minimize and Maximize' window control settings

[47.6-2]
- Add Access Point 'Attach' setting to wwan connections

[47.6-1]
- Update to 47.6

[47.5-2]
- Add option to enable/disable Activities Overview Shortcut

[47.5-1]
- Update to 47.5

[47.3-5]
- Add subscription-manager translations for supported languages
full_text:
[47.7-1]
- Update to 47.7

[47.6-3]
- Add 'Minimize and Maximize' window control settings

[47.6-2]
- Add Access Point 'Attach' setting to wwan connections

[47.6-1]
- Update to 47.6

[47.5-2]
- Add option to enable/disable Activities Overview Shortcut

[47.5-1]
- Update to 47.5

[47.3-5]
- Add subscription-manager translations for supported languages

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20332-0.html
